oid4vci-issuer.target: Marty's public credential-issuer URL through the gateway

oid4vp-verifier.target: Marty's public verifier URL through the gateway
oid4vp-verifier.reason: The official verifier configuration is enabled only after the production wallet callback adapter is represented in a reviewed configuration.

certification.reason: Certification execution is deferred until funding is approved. It uses this same pinned runner, profile configuration, production image digests, and exported evidence.
